security_notice: Server-safe configuration with unsafe tools disabled. Document processor and sequential thinking tools have security limits.

crypto_price.description: Get current cryptocurrency price for a given symbol.

fetch_url.description: Fetch and extract content from a web URL.

web_search.description: Perform a web search (DuckDuckGo) and return top results.

create_thinking_session.description: Create a new sequential thinking session with security limits (max 50 sessions, 100 thoughts/session, 5000 chars/thought, 1hr timeout).

add_sequential_thought.description: Add a thought to an existing session with security limits (max 100 thoughts/session, 5000 chars/thought).

get_thinking_session.description: Get a complete thinking session with memory usage statistics.

list_thinking_sessions.description: List all active sequential thinking sessions with memory usage.

get_thinking_path.description: Get the path from root to a specific thought in a session.

get_thinking_summary.description: Get a summary of a thinking session with key insights.

get_thinking_statistics.description: Get overall thinking system statistics and memory usage.

get_thought_path.description: Get the path from root to a specific thought.

get_current_time.description: Get the current time in a specific timezone.

parse_time.description: Parse a time string into a structured format.

time_difference.description: Calculate the difference between two times.

format_time.description: Format an ISO time string to a custom format.

add_duration.description: Add a duration to a base time.

discovery.note: This file is generated once from current MCP modules and can be edited manually. No auto-discovery is required at runtime.
